title: FEC Guided Start
subtitle: Week 2 introduces your first guided FEC wizard — three customer-focused building blocks only. The full Financial Entrepreneurship Canvas unlocks in Week 3.
principle: A strong business starts with understanding real customer needs before designing solutions.

steps.title: Customer Segment
steps.question: Who do I want to serve?
steps.description: Name a specific group you would genuinely love to help — not everyone. Use your Week 1 Dream Board as a clue.

fields.label: Your customer segment
fields.hint: Be concrete: age, life stage, occupation, or situation.

steps.title: Customer Problem
steps.question: What important problem do they face?
steps.description: Describe the urgent financial or life problem this segment struggles with today — before you offer any solution.

fields.label: Their core problem
fields.hint: Focus on pain, fear, or risk — not product features.

steps.title: Value Proposition
steps.question: How will I help solve that problem?
steps.description: State how you will help this customer move from their problem toward a better outcome — your first draft of value.

fields.label: Your value proposition
fields.hint: Connect your segment + problem to the transformation you offer.
